data.description: MUSK SAID TESLA WON’T SEE MEANINGFUL OPTIMUS HUMANOID ROBOT PRODUCTION UNTIL LATE 2026, WITH 2026 SHAPING UP AS A HEAVY INVESTMENT YEAR AS CAPEX IS SET TO EXCEED $20 BILLION.

TESLA IS PUSHING HARD ON AUTONOMY—ROBOTAXIS IN AUSTIN NO LONGER USE CHASE CARS, FSD USERS HIT 1.1 MILLION, AUTONOMY SOFTWARE IS THE MAIN GROWTH DRIVER, BUT BATTERY PACKS REMAIN THE BIGGEST CONSTRAINT AND ENERGY MARGINS FACE PRESSURE FROM CHEAP COMPETITION.
TESLA WILL WIND DOWN MODEL S AND X PRODUCTION NEXT QUARTER, REPURPOSING FREMONT CAPACITY FOR THE OPTIMUS ROBOT LINE, WHILE AIMING TO DEBUT THE NEXT-GENERATION ROADSTER IN APRIL.

data.title: Halper Sadeh LLC urges PEN, RAPT, LSTA shareholders to discuss rights promptly. Investigating violations. Contact them.
data.description: Investors are encouraged to reach out to the company promptly as time may be running out to assert your rights. In a press release dated Jan. 28, 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC, a law firm specializing in investor rights, disclosed their examination of several companies for potential infractions of federal securities regulations and/or breaches of fiduciary duties. Shareholders are advised to take action swiftly to safeguard their interests.

data.title: Banco Itaú Chile schedules Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting for April 9, 2026, at 10:00 a.m.
data.description: In Santiago, Chile on January 28, 2026, Banco Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) announced that during a regular meeting, the Bank's Board of Directors decided to convene the Ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for April 9, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. to discuss relevant issues falling under its authority.

data.title: Collective Metals closed private placement for $1,438,665.72, issuing 16,925,479 units at $0.085 each with additional warrants.
data.description: Collective Metals Inc. has successfully completed its non-brokered private placement, issuing 16,925,479 units at $0.085 per unit, generating $1,438,665.72 in gross proceeds. Each unit includes a common share and a transferable common share purchase warrant, allowing holders to acquire an additional share at an exercise price of $0.105 within 24 months. The warrants also have an Acceleration Clause that allows for an early expiry if shares reach or exceed $0.20 for ten consecutive trading days.

data.title: Psyence BioMed delays 1-for-6.25 reverse stock split, initially set for Jan 20, 2026; new effective date not revealed.
data.description: On Jan. 28, 2026, Psyence Biomedical Ltd. (Nasdaq: PBM) disclosed the new effective date for its 1-for-6.25 share consolidation. The Board of Directors sanctioned the reverse stock split at a ratio of 1-for-6.25 to be implemented at the market opening on Jan. 20, 2026. However, the Company decided to postpone the reverse stock split's effectiveness after internal deliberation.

data.title: York Space Systems prices upsized IPO at $34/share for 18.5M shares, raised total $629M.
data.description: York, based in Denver, has confirmed the pricing of its increased initial public offering of 18.5 million shares of its common stock at $34 per share for the public offering.
GOLD RISES PAST $5,500 AN OUNCE FOR FIRST TIME EVER

data.title: ELSP reports Q4 results, 22nd annual dividend increase, and 2026 guidance. Stock NYSE: ELS. Reported on Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: CHICAGO, Jan. 28, 2026 – Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc. (NYSE: ELS) disclosed impressive performance by releasing their results for the quarter and year ending. The company also issued guidance for 2026, showcasing a continuous positive trend. Noteworthy milestones include the 22nd annual increase in dividends, highlighting a strong financial position. This marks a remarkable achievement for Equity LifeStyle Properties, Inc., demonstrating their commitment to delivering value to shareholders.

data.title: AZ Blue Health Choice is providing safe affordable housing in Northern Arizona, addressing high housing costs in Flagstaff.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Phoenix, many families residing in Northern Arizona struggle to find a secure and reasonably priced residence. In Flagstaff, housing expenses are noted as one of the highest in the area, making it challenging for families to attain affordable housing. The costly nature of housing in Flagstaff pushes the dream of owning a home further away from these families.

data.title: Neogen recalls Hyaluronate Sodium Sterile Solution for pets due to contamination causing adverse events.
data.description: In Lansing, Michigan, Neogen Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) has announced a voluntary recall of all lots within expiration of Neogen®Vet HYCOAT® Hyaluronate Sodium Sterile Solution for dogs, cats, and horses. This product, distributed by Neogen and manufactured by a third-party supplier, is being recalled to the veterinarian level. The recall was prompted by microbial contamination found in specific lots of 10 mL/50 mg product vials. There have been numerous reports of adverse events in horses following the use of the affected product.

data.title: Low Cost Pet Vax to hold affordable pet vaccination clinic in Bastrop on Feb 15th, 10am-4pm at Hay Elotes, 900 State Hwy 95.
data.description: In Bastrop, Texas, a low-cost pet vaccination clinic event is scheduled for Sunday, February 15th, 2026, from 10:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. The event, organized by Low Cost Pet Vax, will be held at Hay Elotes, 900 State Hwy 95 #103, Bastrop, TX 78602.

data.title: Interparfums signs 20-yr worldwide license deal with David Beckham for fragrance line. - Key details: Exclusive; 20 years; Global distribution.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Interparfums, Inc. disclosed that they reached a significant milestone by securing an exclusive 20-year global license agreement with David Beckham for the manufacturing and distribution of fragrances under his brand. The agreement for fragrance development under the David Beckham label will be limited to Interparfums. The partnership is anticipated to bring about a range of new scents and products in the market over the coming years. This collaboration, conducted through Interparfums, stands as a strategic move in the fragrance industry and is bound to make a substantial impact on the market.

data.title: City Ventures opens Brittain Oaks in Santa Rosa, its seventh community in the area, offering two-story townhomes.
data.description: City Ventures, a top builder of solar-powered homes in California, has officially opened Brittain Oaks in Santa Rosa, their seventh community in the city. The new neighborhood showcases two-story townhomes and will debut decorated model homes this weekend. Santa Rosa is known for its eco-friendly homes and this latest addition adds to City Ventures' portfolio of successful projects in Northern California. The Grand Opening is expected to draw a significant crowd as the public gets a first look at this highly anticipated community.

data.title: Interparfums signs 20-year exclusive license agreement with Nautica to produce fragrances worldwide.
data.description: Interparfums, Inc. disclosed today, on January 28, 2026, that it has signed an exclusive 20-year global license agreement with Nautica, a renowned lifestyle brand. The agreement, valued at an undisclosed amount, grants Interparfums the rights to produce and distribute fragrances under the Nautica brand name worldwide. This strategic partnership is expected to enhance both companies' presence in the fragrance market and drive future growth opportunities. The deal signifies a significant move for Interparfums, listed on the NASDAQ GS as IPAR, as it expands its portfolio and strengthens its position in the industry.

data.title: October 2025 industry expense indices show operational discipline with increased efficiency in labor and non-wage expenses - PRNewswire Boston, Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: In January 2026, the latest industry expense indices showed promising results for October 2025, indicating improved operational efficiency among real estate firms. The data highlighted a noticeable emphasis on operational discipline, leading to reductions in both non-wage expenses and labor costs. This shift signifies a positive trend towards more streamlined operations within the real estate sector, with significant improvements in cost management. These indices demonstrate a clear focus on optimizing resources and enhancing overall profitability within the industry.

data.title: Law firm investigates data breach at Melwood, Inc. affecting customers between Aug 9-17, 2025. Call for legal assistance.
data.description: In Newtown, Pennsylvania, on January 28, 2026, Edelson Lechtzin LLP, a law firm, is currently looking into data privacy allegations related to a situation at Melwood, Inc. The breach at Melwood occurred from August 9 to August 17, 2025. Those seeking to explore this matter further with legal representation are encouraged to reach out.

data.title: Tenuta Luce introduces Luce Brunello 2021, a balanced and precise vintage of Brunello di Montalcino, now available globally.
data.description: Available for purchase worldwide, Tenuta Luce introduces the 2021 Luce Brunello, the newest vintage of its renowned Brunello di Montalcino from Italy. Crafted with precision and balance, this wine reflects the essence of its region.
Prostar increases convertible debenture financing amount.
